verses.text: Aaron' tapa nihte in ngeina lopi-in Topa' mai-ah mei tawh va pai-in a sihlawh khit uh ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah thu a gen hi

Topa in Moses kiangah, “Thuciamna singkuang tunga om hehpihna tokhom mai, dalna puan sunglam a siangtho munah a hunlopi-in hong pai nawnlohna dingin na sanggampa Aaron kiangah gen in. A hunlopi-in hong pai leh amah si ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua mun pen hehpihna tokhom tunga meii sungah kei ka kilatna mun ahi hi
Ahih hangin siangtho munah Aaron hong pai ding zia in: Khialhna hanga biakna dingin bawngtalno khat leh meihal biakna dingin tuutal khat hong paipih ding hi

“Amah in a siangtho saihadial puantungsilh silhin, saihadial pheituam teengin, saihadial kawnggak tawh kigakin, saihadial dialpi khim ding hi. Hihte pen a siangtho puan ahi hi. Amah in tui sungah a pumpi sil ding a, tua ciangin tua puante silh ding hi
“Amah in Israel mihonte tung panin khialhna hanga biakna dingin keeltal nih leh meihal biakna dingin tuutal khat la ding hi
Aaron in amahmah-a' dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal pia-in, amah leh a innkuanpihte-a' dingin kilemna bawl ding hi
Tua ciangin amah in keeltal nih la-in, Topa' mai kikhopna bukkongah tuate koih ding hi
Aaron in tua keel nihte tungah ai saanin, khat pen Topa-a' ding, adang khat pen Azazel-a' ding ahi hi
Aaron in Topa-a' ding ai a pha keel paipihin, khialhna hanga biakna-in pia ding hi
Ahih hangin Azazel-a' dingin ai a pha keel pen gamlakah Azazel' kiangah a kipuak theihna dingin kilemna bawlna dingin a hingin Topa' mai-ah kipaipih ding hi
“Aaron in amahmah-a' dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal pia-in, amah leh a innkuanpihte-a' dingin kilemna bawl ding a, amahmah-a' dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal go ding hi
Amah in Topa' biakna tau panin mei-am a dim paknamtui beel khat leh a kisunen paknamtui khut nih dim la ding hi. Amah in dalna puan sungah paipihin
thuciamna singkuang tungah a om hehpihna tokhom pen paknamtui khu in a tuam theihna dingin Topa' mai-ah a om mei tungah a paknamtui koih ding hi. Tua hi kei leh amah si ding hi
Amah in bawngtal si tawmkhat la-in, a khutme tawh hehpihna tokhom a mailam tungah thehin, hehpihna tokhom mai-ah a khutme tawh a si sagihvei theh ding hi

“Tua ciangin amah in mite-a' ding ahi khialhna hanga biakna keel go-in, dalna puan sungah a si paipih ding a, bawngtal si a theh mah bangin a si thehin, hehpihna tokhom tung leh hehpihna tokhom mai-ah theh ding hi

Amah in tua bangin Israel mite' nitna hang, amau' thu palsatna hang, leh amau' khialhna khempeuh hangin siangtho muna dingin kilemna bawl ding hi. Amah in amau' nitna sungah amau tawh a omkhawm kikhopna buk-a' dingin tua mah bangin a bawl ding hi

Siangtho munah kilemna bawl dingin amah tumin ama-a' ding, a innkuanpihte-a' ding, leh Israel mihonte khempeuh-a' dingin kilemna a bawl khit hong paikhiat matengin kikhopna buk sungah kuamah omlo ding hi
Tua ciangin Topa' mai-ah a om biakna tau-ah amah va pai-in, biakna tau sian'suahna bawl ding a, bawngtal si leh keel si tawmkhat la-in, biakna tau kimkot-a a kite nuh ding hi
Amah in a khutme tawh a si tawmkhat biakna tau tungah sagihvei thehin, siangsakin, Israel mite' nitsakna panin biakna tau siangthosak ding hi
“Amah in siangtho mun, kikhopna buk, leh biakna tau sian'suahna a bawl khit ciangin, keel hing pen paipih ding hi

Aaron in keel hing lu tungah a khutte gel nga-in, Israel mite' mawhna, amau' thu palsatna, leh amau' khialhnate khempeuh, keel tungah pulak ding hi. Amah in keel lu tungah tuate suanin, a paikhiatpih dingin a kithawisa mipa tawh sehnel gamah sawlkhia ding hi
Keel in amau' mawhnate khempeuh pua-in gam daihna-ah a pai dingin a keel khah ding hi
“Tua ciangin kikhopna bukah Aaron hong pai-in, siangtho munah a tum hunin a silh saihadial puante suahin, tua lai-ah a puante nusia ding hi
Amah in a siangtho mun khatah, a pumpi tui sungah silin, a puante silh ding a, hong paikhia-in, ama meihal biakna leh mite' meihal biakna pia-in, ama-a' ding leh mite-a' dingin kilemna bawl ding hi
Amah in biakna tau tungah khialhna hanga biakna sathau hal ding hi
Azazel' kiangah keel a paisakpa in a puante sawpin, a pumpi tui sungah sil ding a, tua khit ciangin giahphualah hong ciah thei ding hi
Siangtho munah kilemna bawlna dingin hong kipaipih si a kilakna, khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal leh keel pen giahphual pualamah kipuakhia ding a, a vun, a sa, leh a ekte, mei tawh kihal ding hi
Tuate a halpa in ama puante sawpin, tui sungah a pumpi sil ding a, tua khit ciangin giahphualah hong ciah thei ding hi
“Hih pen, a kha sagihna, a ni sawm ni-in note-a' dingin a tawntungin thukham hi ding a, tualsung mi hita leh note lakah a hong peem khualmi hita leh in an tangin, na na sem kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh hih ni-in note sian'sakna dingin note-a' ding kilemna kibawl ding a, na khialhna khempeuh panun Topa' mai-ah na siang ding uh hi
Tua pen note-a' dingin a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath hi a, an na tang ding uh hi. Tua pen a tawntunga thukham ahi hi
A pa' tanga siampi dingin sathau a kinilh a ki-ap siampipa in kilemna bawlin, a siangtho saihadial puante silh ding hi
Amah in biakbuk sian'suahna bawlin, kikhopna buk leh biakna tau sian'suah ding a, siampite leh mihonte khempeuh-a' dingin kilemna a bawl ding hi

Hih pen Israel mite-a' dingin amau' khialhnate khempeuh hangin kum khatin khatvei kilemna a kibawlsak theihna dingin note-a' dingin a om tawntung ngeina kip khat hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Topa in amah a thupiak bangin Moses a gamta hi.
